summary: Split from MPI-226: gallery placeholder/preview/status-bar lost on Stop-driven loop re-fire (ordering race, display-only, gen completes fine). Root proven via instrumented logs; full arch map in research/system-map.md. INVESTIGATION-FIRST — 6 point-fixes failed; real fix = idempotent placeholder reconcile from activeGenerations, no first-running coupling.

Card RE-EVALUATED + plan.md written. Key finding: all failure evidence (6 point-fixes, inCardMap=FALSE log) predates the double-fire guard; guard+revert combo NEVER retested — symptom may be dead. Plan: Phase 0 user repro gate; if broken, 1-line status-first reorder in activeGenerations.cancel() (source fix, not gallery rewrite); reconcile rewrite = last resort keeping first-running semantics. Status-bar prompt_id-filter idea corrected (stdout tqdm has no prompt id → gate on WS executing instead). Flagged: HEAD d4a528f contains committed MPI-226 instrumentation; working-tree revert must be committed.

ROOT FOUND + FIX SHIPPED. Repro-gate: symptom survived double-fire fix (deterministic, all 3 Stop timings; N/M sane). Root = gallery Stop handler post-cancel wipe: pb.on(cancel) calls cancelRunningCueJob (loop re-fire runs synchronously inside, new placeholder correctly mounted) then setGroups(projectGroups) with no placeholders — wipes it. Not a race; last-write wipe AFTER all lifecycle handlers (why 6 point-fixes failed). Fix: setGroups([..._placeholdersForFirst(), ...currentGroups]) in Stop handler. Awaiting user retest incl. status-bar check.

FIX 1 (gallery Stop-handler placeholder wipe) USER-VERIFIED: re-fired gen shows card + latents at all 3 Stop timings. Residual: status bar stuck IDLE for the re-fired run. Root (structural): every bar-kill path nulls _activeGenId and reconcile would revive — EXCEPT when a driving event _latch()es the new genId while bar idle; then _reconcileFromStore owner-equality check (genId !== _activeGenId) skips re-arm forever; tool:progress/stage no-op when idle. FIX 2 SHIPPED: statusBar.js _reconcileFromStore re-arms when (genId !== _activeGenId || _state !== active) — store truth wins both directions (mirror of the running=[] self-heal). genId!==null guard preserved (tool-panel previews stay silent). Complete-flash window safe (tool:idle nulls latch before flash; self-heal no-ops). Awaiting retest: bar live on re-fired gen + no completion-flash regression.
USER-VERIFIED both fixes: Stop-refired gen shows card+latents (fix 1, gallery Stop-handler reconcile) AND live status bar (fix 2, statusBar bidirectional store reconcile). Card closed.
